citations.desc: Access and inspection of records and property; submission of itineraries.
citations.narrative:
A responsible adult was not available to accompany APHIS Officials during the inspection process at 12:24pm on March
19, 2026. The inspector attempted to contact the licensee and the facility representative by phone, voicemail, and email.
Licensee returned call stating he was out of the country since July 2025. Inspector waited an hour, but facility
representative attempts for contact were unsuccessful. Failure to provide access to the facility, animals, and records for
inspection is a violation of the AWA and regulations. Continued failure to provide access is serious and may result in
enforcement action.
End Section

narrative:
2.126(b) 
   
Access and inspection of records and property; submission of itineraries. 
A responsible adult was not available to accompany APHIS Officials during the inspection process at 12:24pm on March 
19, 2026. The inspector attempted to contact the licensee and the facility representative by phone, voicemail, and email. 
Licensee returned call stating he was out of the country since July 2025. Inspector waited an hour, but facility 
representative attempts for contact were unsuccessful. Failure to provide access to the facility, animals, and records for 
inspection is a violation of the AWA and regulations. Continued failure to provide access is serious and may result in 
enforcement action. 
 
 
End Section
